use_cases: Display interactive book covers in e-commerce storefronts
Create visual book previews in reading applications
Add decorative book illustrations to educational platforms
Showcase literary products with 3D hover effects in online catalogs
ai_summary: A 3D interactive book component with CSS perspective transforms that creates a realistic book display. Features customizable colors, illustrations, and a smooth hover animation that tilts and scales the book for depth. Includes a realistic book binding effect and supports multiple variants for different design needs.
